output.code:
# Let's open the file and print it with indices or show the text length.
path = '/mnt/data/file-QB8NC8VgaPZ5q66XqmDpUW-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text)

# Let's display the text to inspect.
print(text)

import re

text = text  # from earlier
# find occurrences with quotes
for m in re.finditer(r'“|"|«|»', text):
    pass
# Let's find the main ayah within quotes by finding the quote then capturing inside quotes
# We'll list all quoted segments between normal double quotes:
segments = []
start = None
for i, ch in enumerate(text):
    if ch == '"':
        if start is None:
            start = i
        else:
            segments.append((start, i))
            start = None
segments, len(segments)

segments_texts = []
for s,e in segments:
    inside = text[s+1:e]
    segments_texts.append((s,e,inside))
segments_texts

# Find all occurrences of "يَا أَي"
matches = []
for m in re.finditer(r'يَا أَي[ُّ ُ][ه]?ا? ?الن[َّ َّ]اس', text):
    matches.append((m.start(), m.group(0)))
matches[:10], len(matches)

phrases = [
"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ",
"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ",
"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ",
"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ",
"يَا أَيها النَّاسُ",
"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّا",
"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّا",
]
for p in phrases:
    idx = text.find(p)
    print(p, idx)

startpos = 1987
idx2 = text.find("يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ", startpos)
idx3 = text.find("يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ", startpos)
idx2, idx3

ayah_starts = [145, 1986, 3153]
ayah_spans = []
for start in ayah_starts:
    # find next '[' after this start
    bracket = text.find('[', start)
    snippet = text[start:bracket]
    # strip trailing whitespace
    stripped = snippet.rstrip()
    end = start + len(stripped)
    print("Start", start, "EndCandidate", end, "SnippetTail", repr(stripped[-10:]))
    ayah_spans.append((start, end, stripped))
ayah_spans

hadith_starts = []
for m in re.finditer(r'لَيَنْتَهِي', text):
    hadith_starts.append(m.start())
hadith_starts

hadith_spans = []
# main hadith inside quotes: identify its enclosing quote end 967 previously from segments data
main_hadith_start = 594
main_hadith_end = 967
main_hadith_text = text[main_hadith_start:main_hadith_end]
hadith_spans.append((main_hadith_start, main_hadith_end, main_hadith_text))
# other hadiths: find until next '['
for start in [2408, 3560]:
    bracket = text.find('[', start)
    snippet = text[start:bracket]
    stripped = snippet.rstrip()
    # Remove one trailing period if present
    if stripped and stripped[-1] in '،؛:.,.!؟…':
        stripped2 = stripped[:-1]
    else:
        stripped2 = stripped
    end = start + len(stripped2)
    hadith_spans.append((start, end, stripped2))
hadith_spans

# verify slicing
ayah1_start = segments_texts[0][0]+1
ayah1_end = segments_texts[0][1]
ayah1_text = text[ayah1_start:ayah1_end]
print(ayah1_start, ayah1_end)
print(ayah1_text == segments_texts[0][2])

for start,end,text_sn in hadith_spans:
    print(start,end, repr(text[start]), repr(text[end-1]))

# Build citations list
citations = []
# Add ayah1 main
citations.append({
    "span_start": ayah1_start,
    "span_end": ayah1_end,
    "span_text": ayah1_text,
    "citation_type": "Aya"
})
# Add ayah2, ayah3
citations.append({
    "span_start": ayah_spans[1][0],
    "span_end": ayah_spans[1][1],
    "span_text": ayah_spans[1][2],
    "citation_type": "Aya"
})
citations.append({
    "span_start": ayah_spans[2][0],
    "span_end": ayah_spans[2][1],
    "span_text": ayah_spans[2][2],
    "citation_type": "Aya"
})

# Add hadith spans
for start,end,txt in hadith_spans:
    citations.append({
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": end,
        "span_text": txt,
        "citation_type": "Hadeeth"
    })

# sort by span_start
citations_sorted = sorted(citations, key=lambda c: c["span_start"])
citations_sorted

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":145,"span_end":336,"span_text":"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَاكُمْ مِنْ ذَكَرٍ وَأُنْثَىٰ وَجَعَلْنَاكُمْ شُعُوبًا وَقَبَائِلَ لِتَعَارَفُوا إِنَّ أَكْرَمَكُمْ عِندَ اللَّهِ أَتْقَاكُمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٌ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":594,"span_end":967,"span_text":"لَيَنْتَهِيّنَ أَقْوَامٌ يَفْتَخِرُونَ بِآبَائِهِمْ الّذينَ مَاتُوا إِنّمَا هُمْ فَحْمُ جَهَنّمَ. أَوْ لَيَكُونُنّ أَهْوَنَ عَلَى اللّهِ مِنَ الْجُعَلِ الّذِي يُدَهْدِهُ الْخرءَ بِأَنْفِهِ. إِنّ اللّهَ قد أَذْهَبَ عَنْكُمْ عُبّيّةَ الْجَاهِلِيّةِ وَفَخْرَهَا بِالاَبَاءِ. إِنّمَا هُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ تَقيّ وَفَاجِرٌ شَقيّ. النّاسُ كُلّهُمْ بَنُو آدَمَ. وآدَمُ خُلِقَ مِنَ تُرَابِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1986,"span_end":2177,"span_text":"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَاكُمْ مِنْ ذَكَرٍ وَأُنْثَى وَجَعَلْنَاكُمْ شُعُوباً وَقَبَائِلَ لِتَعَارَفُوا إِنَّ أَكْرَمَكُمْ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ أَتْقَاكُمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٌ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":2408,"span_end":2678,"span_text":"لَيَنْتَهِيّنَ أَقْوَامٌ يَفْتَخِرُونَ بِآبَائِهِمْ الّذينَ مَاتُوا إِنّمَا هُمْ فَحْمُ جَهَنّمَ. أَوْ لَيَكُونُنّ أَهْوَنَ عَلَى اللّهِ مِنَ الْجُعَلِ الّذِي يُدَهْدِهُ الْخرءَ بِأَنْفِهِ. إِنّ اللّهَ قد أَذْهَبَ عَنْكُمْ عُبّيّةَ الْجَاهِلِيّةِ وَفَخْرَهَا بِالاَبَاءِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":3153,"span_end":3344,"span_text":"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَاكُمْ مِنْ ذَكَرٍ وَأُنْثَى وَجَعَلْنَاكُمْ شُعُوباً وَقَبَائِلَ لِتَعَارَفُوا إِنَّ أَكْرَمَكُمْ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ أَتْقَاكُمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٌ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":3560,"span_end":3828,"span_text":"لَيَنْتَهِيّنَ أَقْوَامٌ يَفْتَخِرُونَ بِآبَائِهِمْ الّذينَ مَاتُوا إِنّمَا هُمْ فَحْمُ جَهَنّمَ. أَوْ لَيَكُونُنّ أَهْوَنَ عَلَى اللهِ مِنَ الْجُعَلِ الّذِي يُدَهْدِهُ الْخرءَ بِأَنْفِهِ. إِنّ اللهَ قد أَذْهَبَ عَنْكُمْ عُبّيّةَ الْجَاهِلِيّةِ وَفَخْرَهَا بِالَابَاءِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"}]}
